Built for Nigeria. Scalable for Africa.

Find Your Place. Build Your Future.

The SIWES marketplace where students, organizations, and institutional coordinators run placements with confidence, visibility, and structure.

Student Registration Organization Registration Coordinator Access

How It Works

Simple, structured flows for students and organizations.

Student Journey

01

Create profile

Complete your student profile with field, level, and preferred states.

02

Discover matches

Browse verified placements ranked by relevance to your preferences.

03

Apply and track

Submit applications and follow status updates from shortlist to confirmation.

Organization Journey

01

Get verified

Register your company profile and submit compliance documents for approval.

02

Publish placements

Create SIWES openings with role details, requirements, and available slots.

03

Review and confirm

Evaluate candidates, manage applications, and confirm selected interns.

Platform Snapshot

Key metrics at a glance.

Students

1.2K+

Verified Orgs

320+

Applications

2.8K+

Placement Rate

68%

Feature Highlights

Designed for reliable SIWES placement management workflows.

Smart Placement Matching

Match students to roles by field, level, and location preferences.

Verified Organization Pipeline

Coordinator-led review workflow keeps opportunities high-quality and trusted.

Role-Based Workspaces

Purpose-built portals for students, organizations, and coordinators.

Coordinator Analytics

Track placement outcomes, approvals, and institution-level progress in one place.

Announcement Broadcast

Share program updates with targeted groups quickly and consistently.

State-Aware Opportunities

Discover openings across Nigeria with clear location and availability signals.

Coordinator-ready operations

Monitor student placement outcomes and organization compliance in one dashboard.

Coordinator Onboarding
